h49a3014eg704bg430cgb45agde1f90d79807: That scamp reminds me of myself when I was a nipper. Always getting into trouble.
hbfb5dc2bge94fg4c3dga761g48cc200db6c8: Met with a lot of harpies, did you?
h2b6c420dgd494g47ecg9a2agf90363d5aa4a: One time my parents denied me a kitten, so I summoned myself a tressym. Dear old Tara. Beautiful creature.
hd0291e96g49f7g4645gbc03g6f64773d4a04: Benefits of a wizard's education, you see. Of course my considerable talent didn't hurt either.
h30ce9503gadd9g4b17g87dfgf31286868e4d: Well... That depends on who you ask, I suppose. I may have summoned things rather more exotic than a winged cat.
hd5800f06gf217g40e0gb968ge93d496e337f: There was that magma mephit once. Nice fellow - we kept in touch.
h29190bfcgdcf3g4cabg82c8g3189fa0cf10b: Of course, in walked the housekeeper. Screaming, yelling, panic, and before you knew it: fire everywhere.
h08e43713g93b0g4cdcgacc6g8f9b3607e6ff: Anyway, I'm glad we got that boy out of his predicament.
h0abe5efag7a85g400dg933eg322d7202c5da: Poor lad would have been harpy feed if it wasn't for you.
h6ee1b311g7805g4356g9245gcee539737f4b: Poor lad would have been harpy feed if it wasn't for us.
h2496f215g71a4g4a92g8d58g9137dbed1dd4: There was that magma mephit once. K'ha'ssji'trach'ash, in fact. You met him.
h87cd96d6gd818g4c3ag8314g1b189c99f611: Considerable talent. Are you always this full of yourself?
h1d3c5a8ag863cg4233gb552g4157a5c8e28d: That's mostly a synonym for 'yes', by the by.
hca10ec6bg1023g453ag9909g95f6bc40a3f2: Right. Bound to be more urchins to save around here.
h40ee1815g3fb5g404egbff2g4f982003cd79: Yes, somehow I can imagine you as a handful.
ha9881babgb479g4906g8374gdaf213d97e5d: I can't stand children like that.
h889c2478g17c7g48c0g95b0gdd8404c41995: The straight and narrow is a boring road to walk, my friend.
